text: accidentally bought a house because i didnt wanna seem rude to the realtor
the bus stop at 3rd and main has seen more of my emotional breakdowns than my therapist
reorganized my closet at 2am and found a shirt i thought my ex stole. owe them an apology
been doomscrolling since 4am and now i know too much about capybara social hierarchies
my blender warranty expired literally yesterday and today it caught fire
3rd flat tire this month. pretty sure my car is cursed or i need new tires idk
had a full existential crisis in the gym shower today. the acoustics really help
been wandering home depot for 2 hours. forgot what i came for but i found a nice faucet
my roommate used MY ice cube tray and didnt refill it. this is war
the coupon book that came in the mail is genuinely the most exciting thing this week
my mortgage payment is due and i still dont understand what escrow means
old lady at the bus stop told me my aura is beige. still thinking about it
found 3 pairs of scissors in my closet at 2am. why do i have so many scissors
phone screen time report came in. im not ok
bought the extended warranty once and they still denied my claim lol never again
spare tire is flat too. the universe has jokes
if water is wet then are we wet when it rains or does the rain become us
an employee asked if i needed help and i panicked and said im just browsing. at home depot
bought a second ice cube tray just so nobody touches mine. labeled it and everything
got a credit card offer addressed to my cat. honestly she'd probably be more responsible
the gutter fell off my house today. homeownership is a scam
someone left a sandwich on the bus stop bench. its been there 3 days. we all just accept it now
decided to organize by color at 2:30am. bad idea everything i own is black or grey
watched a 45 min video essay about a drama in a community i dont belong to at 5am
laptop charger died 1 week after warranty. they planned this
ran over a nail in my own driveway. my driveway betrayed me
realized in the shower that nobody actually knows how to fold a fitted sheet
there should be a support group for people who go to home depot for one thing and leave with twelve
roommate put the ice tray back with ONE cube in it. one. cube.
the pizza place menu that comes in the mail every week is my most stable relationship
a pipe burst at 3am and i just stood there in my underwear questioning my life choices
my neighbor mows at 7am on saturdays. i have drafted 14 passive aggressive notes
the office microwave smells like betrayal and reheated fish
tried to meal prep on sunday. ate it all by monday lunch
my plants are alive and i genuinely dont know how. im scared to change anything
parallel parked on the first try today and nobody was around to see it
the check engine light has been on so long i consider it a feature now
wifi went out and i just sat there for 20 minutes like a victorian ghost
coworker microwaved fish again. considering quitting
my sourdough starter has more social life than me. people ask about it by name
found a grocery list from 2019 in my coat. i still never bought that paprika
the bus was on time today and it honestly threw off my whole morning
got a flat tire in the tire shop parking lot. they all just stared at me
home depot has a hierarchhy and the guys in the lumber section are at the top
my ice cube tray has a crack in it now. i blame my roommate
the junk mail is the only mail i get anymore. at least someone thinks of me
property tax bill arrived. who do i even talk to about this
showerthought: we're all just houseplants with more complicated emotions
my screen time went down 2% and my phone congratulated me. felt patronizing
the warranty on my soul expired years ago tbh
put up a shelf. it fell down. put it up again. it fell down again. i am defeated
my neighbor got a leaf blower. our cold war has entered a new phase
someone at the bus stop asked me for the time and i showed them my phone like a psychopath
organized my junk drawer at 1am. its already a mess again
the gym shower is the only place i can hear myself think. and cry
i know the home depot paint section better than my own family at this point
started reading the terms of service on a junk mail sweepstakes. i need hobbies
tire pressure light came on again. at this point we're in a relationship
the ice cube tray situation has escalated. there are now labels, rules, and a shared google doc
my toaster warranty expired and it immediately started burning everything on one side
fell asleep scrolling and liked a post from 2018. no recovering from this
bought a house and nobody told me id spend every weekend at lowes or home depot
the laundromat dryer ate my sock. this is a pattern now
my neighbor and i had a full conversation through our walls last night. thin walls gang
there is a pigeon at this bus stop who i see more than my friends
tried the konmari method at 3am. nothing sparks joy at 3am
conditioner ran out mid shower and i had to make peace with who i am as a person
walked into home depot confidently and then forgot every measurement i took
my roommate filled the ice tray with hot water. HOT WATER
got pre-approved for a credit card through junk mail. tempting ngl
tire went flat on the highway during a rainstorm because of course it did
microwave warranty voided because i "misused" it. i literally just heated soup
my recommended page is just conspiracy theories and cake decorating now. algorithm knows me
HOA sent me a letter about my lawn. i didnt know i was in an HOA
the vending machine at work owes me $4.75. i am keeping a ledger
put my keys in a "safe place" and now theyre gone forever
ceiling fan started making a noise. im choosing to ignore it
bus was 20 min late and the guy next to me told me his entire life story. gerald seems nice
found clothes with tags still on from 3 years ago during my 2am reorganize session
the water pressure in the gym shower changed my perspective on what luxury means
spent $200 at home depot for a project i will absolutely never finish
bought fancy silicone ice cube trays. roommate still uses mine. boundaries mean nothing
a catalog for luxury watches came in the mail. they clearly dont know me
fix a flat spray is my love language at this point
fridge warranty expired and the ice maker stopped same day. coincidence? no
3:47am and ive reached the part of the internet with homemade medieval weapons tutorials
tried to sell my house and the inspector found 11 problems i didnt know about
my coworker clips their nails at their desk. considering arson
the dryer sheet stuck to my back all day and nobody told me
thermostat war with my partner is the longest conflict in modern history
bus stop bench is wet every single morning. where does the water come from. its not raining
built an entire closet organization system at 3am. its beautiful. i will never maintain it
if everybody in the gym shower is avoiding eye contact then who is watching
employee at home depot called me a regular today. i dont know how to feel about that
the ice cube tray google doc now has a revision history and a changelog
my mailbox is 90% junk and 10% bills. would prefer 100% junk honestly
got 2 flat tires at once. didnt even know that was possible
printer jammed right after the warranty ended. these companies have sensors i swear
accidentally learned everything about train signaling systems at 4am. send help
my toilet runs constantly and ive just accepted the white noise
